title: [Today’s Signal] Trump-Xi Meeting Reveals AI Surveillance Cold War Linking UAP, Taiwan and Chips
description: Beijing—At first glance, the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing and Washington’s release of files on unidentified aerial phenomena appear to belong to separate news cycles. One concerns diplomacy and security. The other seems closer to the long-running UFO debate. Yet both point to the same structural shift

title: Hantavirus update, Pentagon’s UFO files, can art slow biological ageing? – podcast
description: Madeleine Finlay sits down with co-host and science editor Ian Sample to discuss three eyecatching stories from the week, including an update on hantavirus. Also on the agenda is the Pentagon’s release of a tranche of never before seen documents relating to UFOs, and a study looking at the link between taking part in cultural activities and slower biological ageing Clips: News Nation Continue reading...

title: New UFO Files Suggest Something Strange Is Happening in The Skies
description: Not aliens, but the mystery is far from over. ScienceAlert stories are written, fact-checked, and edited by humans, never generated by AI. Don't miss a story, subscribe here.

title: New UFO files offer no answers—but something is happening in the skies
description: The US Government has released a new trove of documents on cases of "unidentified anomalous phenomena" (UAPs)—many of which would have been described in the past as unidentified flying objects or UFOs—including photos, videos and reports of unexplained events sighted in the sky and in space.
